type=\"range\" id=\"replay-scrubber\" class=\"replay-scrubber\"\n125\t                           min=\"0\" max=\"100\" step=\"0.1\" value=\"0\"\n126\t                           title=\"Scrub through timeline\">\n127\t                    <div id=\"replay-event-markers\" class=\"replay-event-markers\"></div>\n128\t                </div>\n129\t\n130\t                <button id=\"replay-close-btn\" class=\"replay-btn\" title=\"Exit replay mode\">\n131\t                    <svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\">\n132\t                        <line x1=\"18\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"6\" y2=\"18\"/>\n133\t                        <line x1=\"6\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"18\" y2=\"18\"/>\n134\t                    </svg>\n135\t                </button>\n136\t            </div>\n137\t\n138\t            <div class=\"replay-tuning\">\n139\t                <button id=\"replay-tune-btn\" class=\"replay-tune-btn\" title=\"Tune detection parameters\">\n140\t                    <svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\">\n141\t                        <circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"3\"/>\n142\t                        <path d=\"M12 1v6m0 6v6\"/>\n143\t                        <path d=\"m19.07 4.93-1.41 1.41M17 16l-5-5\"/>\n144\t                        <path d=\"M4.93 19.07l1.41-1.41M16 17l5-5\"/>\n145\t                    </svg>\n146\t                    Tune\n147\t                </button>\n148\t            </div>\n149\t        `;\n150\t\n151\t        // Insert after status bar\n152\t        statusBar.parentNode.insertBefore(replayBar, statusBar.nextSibling);\n153\t\n154\t        // Store element references\n155\t        elements = {\n156\t            bar: replayBar,\n157\t            backBtn: document.getElementById('replay-back-btn'),\n158\t            timestamp: document.getElementById('replay-timestamp'),\n159\t            range: document.getElementById('replay-range'),\n160\t            playBtn: document.getElementById('replay-play-btn'),\n161\t            playIcon: document.getElementById('play-icon'),\n162\t            pauseIcon: document.getElementById('pause-icon'),\n163\t            speed: document.getElementById('replay-speed'),\n164\t            scrubber: document.getElementById('replay-scrubber'),\n165\t            closeBtn: document.getElementById('replay-close-btn'),\n166\t            tuneBtn: document.getElementById('replay-tune-btn'),\n167\t        };\n168\t\n169\t        // Attach event listeners\n170\t        elements.backBtn.addEventListener('click', onBackToLive);\n171\t        elements.playBtn.addEventListener('click', onPlayPause);\n172\t        elements.speed.addEventListener('change', onSpeedChange);\n173\t        elements.scrubber.addEventListener('input', onScrub);\n174\t        elements.closeBtn.addEventListener('click', onExitReplay);\n175\t        elements.tuneBtn.addEventListener('click', onTuneParams);\n176\t    }\n177\t\n178\t    // ============================================\n179\t    // API Communication\n180\t    // ============================================\n181\t    function fetchStoreInfo() {\n182\t        fetch('/api/replay/sessions')\n183\t            .then(res => res.json())\n184\t            .then(data => {\n185\t                state.storeOldestMs = data.oldest_timestamp_ms;\n186\t                state.storeNewestMs = data.newest_timestamp_ms;\n187\t                state.storeHasData = data.has_data;\n188\t                console.log('[Replay] Store info:', data);\n189\t            })\n190\t            .catch(err => {\n191\t                console.error('[Replay] Failed to fetch store info:', err);\n192\t            });\n193\t    }\n194\t\n195\t    function startReplaySession(fromMs, toMs) {\n196\t        const fromISO = new Date(fromMs).toISOString();\n197\t        const toISO = toMs ? new Date(toMs).toISOString() : '';\n198\t\n199\t        return fetch('/api/replay/start', {\n200\t            method: 'POST',\n201\t            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n202\t            body: JSON.stringify({\n203\t                from_iso8601: fromISO,\n204\t                to_iso8601: toISO,\n205\t                speed: 1\n206\t            })\n207\t        })\n208\t        .then(res => {\n209\t            if (!res.ok) {\n210\t                throw new Error('Failed to start replay: ' + res.statusText);\n211\t            }\n212\t            return res.json();\n213\t        })\n214\t        .then(data => {\n215\t            state.activeSessionId = data.session_id;\n216\t            state.sessionFromMs = data.from_ms;\n217\t            state.sessionToMs = data.to_ms;\n218\t            state.sessionCurrentMs = data.from_ms;\n219\t            state.sessionState = 'paused';\n220\t            state.sessionSpeed = data.speed;\n221\t\n222\t            console.log('[Replay] Session started:', data);\n223\t            updateUI();\n224\t            return data.session_id;\n225\t        });\n226\t    }\n227\t\n228\t    function stopReplaySession() {\n229\t        if (!state.activeSessionId) return Promise.resolve();\n230\t\n231\t        return fetch('/api/replay/stop', {\n232\t            method: 'POST',\n233\t            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n234\t            body: JSON.stringify({\n235\t                session_id: state.activeSessionId\n236\t            })\n237\t        })\n238\t        .then(res => {\n239\t            if (!res.ok) {\n240\t                throw new Error('Failed to stop replay: ' + res.statusText);\n241\t            }\n242\t            return res.json();\n243\t        })\n244\t        .then(() => {\n245\t            console.log('[Replay] Session stopped:', state.activeSessionId);\n246\t            state.activeSessionId = null;\n247\t            state.isPaused = false;\n248\t            updateUI();\n249\t        });\n250\t    }\n251\t\n252\t    function seekReplay(targetMs) {\n253\t        if (!state.activeSessionId) return Promise.resolve();\n254\t\n255\t        const targetISO = new Date(targetMs).toISOString();\n256\t\n257\t        return fetch('/api/replay/seek', {\n258\t            method: 'POST',\n259\t            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n260\t            body: JSON.stringify({\n261\t                session_id: state.activeSessionId,\n262\t                timestamp_iso8601: targetISO\n263\t            })\n264\t        })\n265\t        .then(res => {\n266\t            if (!res.ok) {\n267\t                throw new Error('Failed to seek: ' + res.statusText);\n268\t            }\n269\t            return res.json();\n270\t        })\n271\t        .then(data => {\n272\t            state.sessionCurrentMs = data.current_ms;\n273\t            updateUI();\n274\t        });\n275\t    }\n276\t\n277\t    function setPlaybackSpeed(speed) {\n278\t        if (!state.activeSessionId) return;\n279\t\n280\t        fetch('/api/replay/set-speed', {\n281\t            method: 'POST',\n282\t            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n283\t            body: JSON.stringify({\n284\t                session_id: state.activeSessionId,\n285\t                speed: speed\n286\t            })\n287\t        })\n288\t        .then(res => {\n289\t            if (!res.ok) {\n290\t                throw new Error('Failed to set speed: ' + res.statusText);\n291\t            }\n292\t            return res.json();\n293\t        })\n294\t        .then(() => {\n295\t            state.sessionSpeed = speed;\n296\t            console.log('[Replay] Speed set to', speed, 'x');\n297\t        });\n298\t    }\n299\t\n300\t    function setPlaybackState(playbackState) {\n301\t        if (!state.activeSessionId) return;\n302\t\n303\t        fetch('/api/replay/set-state', {\n304\t            method: 'POST',\n305\t            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n306\t            body: JSON.stringify({\n307\t                session_id: state.activeSessionId,\n308\t                state: playbackState\n309\t            })\n310\t        })\n311\t        .then(res => {\n312\t            if (!res.ok) {\n313\t                throw new Error('Failed to set state: ' + res.statusText);\n314\t            }\n315\t            return res.json();\n316\t        })\n317\t        .then(() => {\n318\t            state.sessionState = playbackState;\n319\t            updatePlayPauseButton();\n320\t        });\n321\t    }\n322\t\n323\t    function fetchSessionBlobs(sessionId) {\n324\t        if (!sessionId) return Promise.resolve();\n325\t\n326\t        return fetch('/api/replay/session/' + encodeURIComponent(sessionId))\n327\t            .then(function(res) {\n328\t                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch session state');\n329\t                return res.json();\n330\t            })\n331\t            .then(function(data) {\n332\t                // Feed replay blobs to 3D scene\n333\t                if (data.blobs && data.blobs.length > 0 && window.Viz3D && Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs) {\n334\t                    Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs(data.blobs, data.timestamp_ms);\n335\t                }\n336\t            })\n337\t            .catch(function(err) {\n338\t                console.warn('[Replay] Failed to fetch session blobs:', err);\n339\t            });\n340\t    }\n341\t\n342\t    function tuneParams(params) {\n343\t        if (!state.activeSessionId) return Promise.resolve();\n344\t\n345\t        return fetch('/api/replay/tune', {\n346\t            method: 'POST',\n347\t            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n348\t            body: JSON.stringify({\n349\t                session_id: state.activeSessionId,\n350\t                ...params\n351\t            })\n352\t        })\n353\t        .then(res => {\n354\t            if (!res.ok) {\n355\t                throw new Error('Failed to tune params: ' + res.statusText);\n356\t            }\n357\t            return res.json();\n358\t        })\n359\t        .then(data => {\n360\t            console.log('[Replay] Parameters tuned:', data.params);\n361\t            return data;\n362\t        });\n363\t    }\n364\t\n365\t    // ============================================\n366\t    // Event Handlers\n367\t    // ============================================\n368\t    function onBackToLive() {\n369\t        exitReplayMode();\n370\t    }\n371\t\n372\t    function onPlayPause() {\n373\t        if (!state.activeSessionId) return;\n374\t\n375\t        const newState = state.sessionState === 'playing' ? 'paused' : 'playing';\n376\t        setPlaybackState(newState);\n377\t    }\n378\t\n379\t    function onSpeedChange(e) {\n380\t        const speed = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);\n381\t        setPlaybackSpeed(speed);\n382\t    }\n383\t\n384\t    function onScrub(e) {\n385\t        const percent = parseFloat(e.target.value);\n386\t        const rangeMs = state.sessionToMs - state.sessionFromMs;\n387\t        const targetMs = state.sessionFromMs + Math.round(rangeMs * percent / 100);\n388\t\n389\t        seekReplay(targetMs);\n390\t    }\n391\t\n392\t    function onExitReplay() {\n393\t        exitReplayMode();\n394\t    }\n395\t\n396\t    function onTuneParams() {\n397\t        showTuningPanel();\n398\t    }\n399\t\n400\t    // ============================================\n401\t    // UI Updates\n402\t    // ============================================\n403\t    function updateUI() {\n404\t        updateTimestampDisplay();\n405\t        updateRangeDisplay();\n406\t        updateScrubber();\n407\t        updatePlayPauseButton();\n408\t    }\n409\t\n410\t    function updateTimestampDisplay() {\n411\t        if (!elements.timestamp) return;\n412\t\n413\t        if (state.sessionCurrentMs !== null) {\n414\t            elements.timestamp.textContent = formatTimestamp(state.sessionCurrentMs);\n415\t        } else {\n416\t            elements.timestamp.textContent = '--:--:--';\n417\t        }\n418\t    }\n419\t\n420\t    function updateRangeDisplay() {\n421\t        if (!elements.range) return;\n422\t\n423\t        if (state.sessionFromMs !== null && state.sessionToMs !== null) {\n424\t            elements.range.textContent = formatTimestamp(state.sessionFromMs) +\n425\t                ' / ' + formatTimestamp(state.sessionToMs);\n426\t        } else {\n427\t            elements.range.textContent = '0:00 / 0:00';\n428\t        }\n429\t    }\n430\t\n431\t    function updateScrubber() {\n432\t        if (!elements.scrubber) return;\n433\t\n434\t        if (state.sessionFromMs !== null && state.sessionToMs !== null) {\n435\t            const rangeMs = state.sessionToMs - state.sessionFromMs;\n436\t            if (state.sessionCurrentMs !== null) {\n437\t                const offset = state.sessionCurrentMs - state.sessionFromMs;\n438\t                const percent = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, (offset / rangeMs) * 100));\n439\t                elements.scrubber.value = percent;\n440\t            }\n441\t        }\n442\t    }\n443\t\n444\t    function updatePlayPauseButton() {\n445\t        if (!elements.playIcon || !elements.pauseIcon) return;\n446\t\n447\t        if (state.sessionState === 'playing') {\n448\t            elements.playIcon.style.display = 'none';\n449\t            elements.pauseIcon.style.display = 'block';\n450\t        } else {\n451\t            elements.playIcon.style.display = 'block';\n452\t            elements.pauseIcon.style.display = 'none';\n453\t        }\n454\t    }\n455\t\n456\t    // ============================================\n457\t    // Mode Transitions\n458\t    // ============================================\n459\t    function enterReplayMode(fromMs, toMs) {\n460\t        console.log('[Replay] Entering replay mode:', { fromMs, toMs });\n461\t\n462\t        state.isReplayMode = true;\n463\t\n464\t        // Start replay session\n465\t        startReplaySession(fromMs, toMs).then(sessionId => {\n466\t            // Show replay control bar\n467\t            if (elements.bar) {\n468\t                elements.bar.style.display = 'block';\n469\t            }\n470\t\n471\t            // Notify 3D visualization to enter replay mode\n472\t            if (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.enterReplayMode) {\n473\t                Viz3D.enterReplayMode();\n474\t            }\n475\t\n476\t            return sessionId;\n477\t        }).catch(err => {\n478\t            console.error('[Replay] Failed to enter replay mode:', err);\n479\t            if (window.SpaxelApp) {\n480\t                SpaxelApp.showToast('Failed to enter replay mode: ' + err.message, 'error');\n481\t            }\n482\t        });\n483\t    }\n484\t\n485\t    function exitReplayMode() {\n486\t        console.log('[Replay] Exiting replay mode');\n487\t\n488\t        // Stop replay session\n489\t        return stopReplaySession().then(() => {\n490\t            state.isReplayMode = false;\n491\t            state.isPaused = false;\n492\t\n493\t            // Hide replay control bar\n494\t            if (elements.bar) {\n495\t                elements.bar.style.display = 'none';\n496\t            }\n497\t\n498\t            // Notify 3D visualization to exit replay mode\n499\t            if (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.exitReplayMode) {\n500\t                Viz3D.exitReplayMode();\n501\t            }\n502\t\n503\t            // Clear timeline selection and now-replaying chip\n504\t            if (window.SpaxelSidebarTimeline) {\n505\t                SpaxelSidebarTimeline.clearSelection();\n506\t                SpaxelSidebarTimeline.hideNowReplayingChip();\n507\t            }\n508\t\n509\t            // Navigate back to live mode\n510\t            if (window.SpaxelRouter) {\n511\t                SpaxelRouter.navigate('live');\n512\t            }\n513\t        });\n514\t    }\n515\t\n516\t    function pauseLiveMode() {\n517\t        if (state.isPaused) {\n518\t            // Already paused, exit replay mode\n519\t            exitReplayMode();\n520\t            return;\n521\t        }\n522\t\n523\t        console.log('[Replay] Pausing live mode');\n524\t\n525\t        state.isPaused = true;\n526\t\n527\t        // Calculate replay window (default: 60 seconds before now)\n528\t        const now = Date.now();\n529\t        const fromMs = now - (CONFIG.defaultReplayWindowSec * 1000);\n530\t        const toMs = now;\n531\t\n532\t        enterReplayMode(fromMs, toMs);\n533\t    }\n534\t\n535\t    // ============================================\n536\t    // Timeline Loop\n537\t    // ============================================\n538\t    let timelineInterval = null;\n539\t\n540\t    function startTimelineLoop() {\n541\t        if (timelineInterval) return;\n542\t\n543\t        timelineInterval = setInterval(() => {\n544\t            if (state.sessionState === 'playing' && state.activeSessionId) {\n545\t                // Fetch current session state\n546\t                fetch(`/api/replay/session/${state.activeSessionId}`)\n547\t                    .then(res => res.json())\n548\t                    .then(data => {\n549\t                        state.sessionCurrentMs = data.current_ms;\n550\t                        updateUI();\n551\t\n552\t                        // Trigger 3D visualization update with replay blobs\n553\t                        if (data.blobs && window.Viz3D && Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs) {\n554\t                            Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs(data.blobs, data.timestamp_ms);\n555\t                        }\n556\t                    })\n557\t                    .catch(err => {\n558\t                        console.error('[Replay] Failed to fetch session state:', err);\n559\t                    });\n560\t            }\n561\t        }, CONFIG.timelineUpdateInterval);\n562\t    }\n563\t\n564\t    // ============================================\n565\t    // Tuning Panel\n566\t    // ============================================\n567\t    function showTuningPanel() {\n568\t        // Create or show tuning panel overlay\n569\t        let panel = document.getElementById('replay-tuning-panel');\n570\t        if (!panel) {\n571\t            panel = createTuningPanel();\n572\t            document.body.appendChild(panel);\n573\t        }\n574\t\n575\t        panel.style.display = 'flex';\n576\t\n577\t        // Fetch current session params\n578\t        if (state.activeSessionId) {\n579\t            fetch(`/api/replay/session/${state.activeSessionId}`)\n580\t                .then(res => res.json())\n581\t                .then(data => {\n582\t                    populateTuningPanel(data.params || {});\n583\t                });\n584\t        }\n585\t    }\n586\t\n587\t    function createTuningPanel() {\n588\t        const panel = document.createElement('div');\n589\t        panel.id = 'replay-tuning-panel';\n590\t        panel.className = 'replay-tuning-panel';\n591\t\n592\t        panel.innerHTML = `\n593\t            <div class=\"replay-tuning-content\">\n594\t                <div class=\"replay-tuning-header\">\n595\t                    <h2>Detection Parameters</h2>\n596\t                    <button class=\"replay-tuning-close\" onclick=\"this.parentElement.parentElement.parentElement.style.display='none'\">\n597\t                        <svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"20\" height=\"20\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\">\n598\t                            <line x1=\"18\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"6\" y2=\"18\"/>\n599\t                            <line x1=\"6\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"18\" y2=\"18\"/>\n600\t                        </svg>\n601\t                    </button>\n602\t                </div>\n603\t\n604\t                <div type=\"range\" id=\"tune-threshold\" min=\"0.001\" max=\"0.1\" step=\"0.001\" value=\"0.02\">\n608\t                        <span class=\"tuning-value\">0.02</span>\n609\t                    </div>\n610\t\n611\t                    <div class=\"tuning-param\">\n612\t                        <label>Baseline Time Constant (tau) [seconds]</label>\n613\t                        <input type=\"range\" id=\"tune-tau\" min=\"1\" max=\"600\" step=\"1\" value=\"30\">\n614\t                        <span class=\"tuning-value\">30</span>\n615\t                    </div>\n616\t\n617\t                    <div class=\"tuning-param\">\n618\t                        <label>Fresnel Weight Decay Rate</label>\n619\t                        <input type=\"range\" id=\"tune-fresnel\" min=\"1.0\"        <label>Breathing Sensitivity</label>\n631\t                        <input type=\"range\" id=\"tune-breathing\" min=\"0.001\" max=\"0.1\" step=\"0.001\" value=\"0.005\">\n632\t                        <span class=\"tuning-value\">0.005</span>\n633\t                    </div>\n634\t\n635\t                    <div class=\"tuning-actions\">\n636\t                        <button id=\"tune-apply-btn\" class=\"tuning-btn\">Apply Parameters</button>\n637\t                        <button id=\"tune-reset-btn\" class=\"tuning-btn tuning-btn-secondary\">Reset to Live</button>\n638\t                    </div>\n639\t                </div>\n640\t            </div>\n641\t        `;\n642\t\n643\t        // Attach event listeners\n644\t        panel.querySelector('#tune-apply-btn').addEventListener('click', applyTuningParams);\n645\t        panel.querySelector('#tune-reset-btn').addEventListener('click', resetTuningParams);\n646\t\n647\t        // Update value displays on slider change\n648\t        panel.querySelectorAll('input[type=\"range\"]').forEach(input => {\n649\t            input.addEventListener('input', (e) => {\n650\t                const valueSpan = e.target.parentElement.querySelector('.tuning-value');\n651\t                if (valueSpan) {\n652\t                    valueSpan.textContent = e.target.value;\n653\t                }\n654\t            });\n655\t        });\n656\t\n657\t        return panel;\n658\t    }\n659\t\n660\t    function populateTuningPanel(params) {\n661\t        const panel = document.getElementById('replay-tuning-panel');\n662\t        if (!panel) return;\n663\t\n664\t        // Update sliders with current params\n665\t        if (params.delta_rms_threshold !== undefined) {\n666\t            const input = panel.querySelector('#tune-threshold');\n667\t            if (input) {\n668\t                input.value = params.delta_rms_threshold;\n669\t                input.parentElement.querySelector('.tuning-value').textContent = params.delta_rms_threshold;\n670\t            }\n671\t        }\n672\t        if (params.tau_s !== undefined) {\n673\t            const input = panel.querySelector('#tune-tau');\n674\t            if (input) {\n675\t                input.value = params.tau_s;\n676\t                input.parentElement.querySelector('.tuning-value').textContent = params.tau_s;\n677\t            }\n678\t        }\n679\t        if (params.fresnel_decay !== undefined) {\n680\t            const input = panel.querySelector('#tune-fresnel');\n681\t            if (input) {\n682\t                input.value = params.fresnel_decay;\n683\t                input.parentElement.querySelector('.tuning-value').textContent = params.fresnel_decay;\n684\t            }\n685\t        }\n686\t        if (params.n_subcarriers !== undefined) {\n687\t            const input = panel.querySelector('#tune-subcarriers');\n688\t            if (input) {\n689\t                input.value = params.n_subcarriers;\n690\t                input.parentElement.querySelector('.tuning-value').textContent = params.n_subcarriers;\n691\t            }\n692\t        }\n693\t        if (params.breathing_sensitivity !== undefined) {\n694\t            const input = panel.querySelector('#tune-breathing');\n695\t            if (input) {\n696\t                input.value = params.breathing_sensitivity;\n697\t                input.parentElement.querySelector('.tuning-value').textContent = params.breathing_sensitivity;\n698\t            }\n699\t        }\n700\t    }\n701\t\n702\t    function applyTuningParams() {\n703\t        const panel = document.getElementById('replay-tuning-panel');\n704\t        if (!panel) return;\n705\t\n706\t        const params = {\n707\t            delta_rms_threshold: parseFloat(panel.querySelector('#tune-threshold').value),\n708\t            tau_s: parseFloat(panel.querySelector('#tune-tau').value),\n709\t            fresnel_decay: Communication\n    // ============================================\n    function fetchStoreInfo() {\n        fetch('/api/replay/sessions')\n            .then(res => res.json())\n            .then(data => {\n                state.storeOldestMs = data.oldest_timestamp_ms;\n                state.storeNewestMs = data.newest_timestamp_ms;\n                state.storeHasData = data.has_data;\n                console.log('[Replay] Store info:', data);\n            })\n            .catch(err => {\n                console.error('[Replay] Failed to fetch store info:', err);\n            });\n    }\n\n    function startReplaySession(fromMs, toMs) {\n        const fromISO = new Date(fromMs).toISOString();\n        const toISO = toMs ? new Date(toMs).toISOString() : '';\n\n        return fetch('/api/replay/start', {\n            method: 'POST',\n            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n            body: JSON.stringify({\n                from_iso8601: fromISO,\n                to_iso8601: toISO,\n                speed: 1\n            })\n        })\n        .then(res => {\n            if (!res.ok) {\n                throw new Error('Failed to start replay: ' + res.statusText);\n            }\n            return res.json();\n        })\n        .then(data => {\n            state.activeSessionId = data.session_id;\n            state.sessionFromMs = data.from_ms;\n            state.sessionToMs = data.to_ms;\n            state.sessionCurrentMs = data.from_ms;\n            state.sessionState = 'paused';\n            state.sessionSpeed = data.speed;\n\n            console.log('[Replay] Session started:', data);\n            updateUI();\n            return data.session_id;\n        });\n    }\n\n    function stopReplaySession() {\n        if (!state.activeSessionId) return Promise.resolve();\n\n        return fetch('/api/replay/stop', {\n            method: 'POST',\n            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n            body: JSON.stringify({\n                session_id: state.activeSessionId\n            })\n        })\n        .then(res => {\n            if (!res.ok) {\n                throw new Error('Failed to stop replay: ' + res.statusText);\n            }\n            return res.json();\n        })\n        .then(() => {\n            console.log('[Replay] Session stopped:', state.activeSessionId);\n            state.activeSessionId = null;\n            state.isPaused = false;\n            updateUI();\n        });\n    }\n\n    function seekReplay(targetMs) {\n        if (!state.activeSessionId) return Promise.resolve();\n\n        const targetISO = new Date(targetMs).toISOString();\n\n        return fetch('/api/replay/seek', {\n            method: 'POST',\n            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n            body: JSON.stringify({\n                session_id: state.activeSessionId,\n                timestamp_iso8601: targetISO\n            })\n        })\n        .then(res => {\n            if (!res.ok) {\n                throw new Error('Failed to seek: ' + res.statusText);\n            }\n            return res.json();\n        })\n        .then(data => {\n            state.sessionCurrentMs = data.current_ms;\n            updateUI();\n        });\n    }\n\n    function setPlaybackSpeed(speed) {\n        if (!state.activeSessionId) return;\n\n        fetch('/api/replay/set-speed', {\n            method: 'POST',\n            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n            body: JSON.stringify({\n                session_id: state.activeSessionId,\n                speed: speed\n            })\n        })\n        .then(res => {\n            if (!res.ok) {\n                throw new Error('Failed to set speed: ' + res.statusText);\n            }\n            return res.json();\n        })\n        .then(() => {\n            state.sessionSpeed = speed;\n            console.log('[Replay] Speed set to', speed, 'x');\n        });\n    }\n\n    function setPlaybackState(playbackState) {\n        if (!state.activeSessionId) return;\n\n        fetch('/api/replay/set-state', {\n            method: 'POST',\n            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n            body: JSON.stringify({\n                session_id: state.activeSessionId,\n                state: playbackState\n            })\n        })\n        .then(res => {\n            if (!res.ok) {\n                throw new Error('Failed to set state: ' + res.statusText);\n            }\n            return res.json();\n        })\n        .then(() => {\n            state.sessionState = playbackState;\n            updatePlayPauseButton();\n        });\n    }\n\n    function fetchSessionBlobs(sessionId) {\n        if (!sessionId) return Promise.resolve();\n\n        return fetch('/api/replay/session/' + encodeURIComponent(sessionId))\n            .then(function(res) {\n                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch session state');\n                return res.json();\n            })\n            .then(function(data) {\n                // Feed replay blobs to 3D scene\n                if (data.blobs && data.blobs.length > 0 && window.Viz3D && Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs) {\n                    Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs(data.blobs, data.timestamp_ms);\n                }\n            })\n            .catch(function(err) {\n                console.warn('[Replay] Failed to fetch session blobs:', err);\n            });\n    }\n\n    function tuneParams(params) {\n        if (!state.activeSessionId) return Promise.resolve();\n\n        return fetch('/api/replay/tune', {\n            method: 'POST',\n            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n            body: JSON.stringify({\n                session_id: state.activeSessionId,\n                ...params\n            })\n        })\n        .then(res => {\n            if (!res.ok) {\n                throw new Error('Failed to tune params: ' + res.statusText);\n            }\n            return res.json();\n        })\n        .then(data => {\n            console.log('[Replay] Parameters tuned:', data.params);\n            return data;\n        });\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Event Handlers\n    // ============================================\n    function onBackToLive() {\n        exitReplayMode();\n    }\n\n    function onPlayPause() {\n        if (!state.activeSessionId) return;\n\n        const newState = state.sessionState === 'playing' ? 'paused' : 'playing';\n        setPlaybackState(newState);\n    }\n\n    function onSpeedChange(e) {\n        const speed = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);\n        setPlaybackSpeed(speed);\n    }\n\n    function onScrub(e) {\n        const percent = parseFloat(e.target.value);\n        const rangeMs = state.sessionToMs - state.sessionFromMs;\n        const targetMs = state.sessionFromMs + Math.round(rangeMs * percent / 100);\n\n        seekReplay(targetMs);\n    }\n\n    function onExitReplay() {\n        exitReplayMode();\n    }\n\n    function onTuneParams() {\n        showTuningPanel();\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // UI Updates\n    // ============================================\n    function updateUI() {\n        updateTimestampDisplay();\n        updateRangeDisplay();\n        updateScrubber();\n        updatePlayPauseButton();\n    }\n\n    function updateTimestampDisplay() {\n        if (!elements.timestamp) return;\n\n        if (state.sessionCurrentMs !== null) {\n            elements.timestamp.textContent = formatTimestamp(state.sessionCurrentMs);\n        } else {\n            elements.timestamp.textContent = '--:--:--';\n        }\n    }\n\n    function updateRangeDisplay() {\n        if (!elements.range) return;\n\n        if (state.sessionFromMs !== null && state.sessionToMs !== null) {\n            elements.range.textContent = formatTimestamp(state.sessionFromMs) +\n                ' / ' + formatTimestamp(state.sessionToMs);\n        } else {\n            elements.range.textContent = '0:00 / 0:00';\n        }\n    }\n\n    function updateScrubber() {\n        if (!elements.scrubber) return;\n\n        if (state.sessionFromMs !== null && state.sessionToMs !== null) {\n            const rangeMs = state.sessionToMs - state.sessionFromMs;\n            if (state.sessionCurrentMs !== null) {\n                const offset = state.sessionCurrentMs - state.sessionFromMs;\n                const percent = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, (offset / rangeMs) * 100));\n                elements.scrubber.value = percent;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    function updatePlayPauseButton() {\n        if (!elements.playIcon || !elements.pauseIcon) return;\n\n        if (state.sessionState === 'playing') {\n            elements.playIcon.style.display = 'none';\n            elements.pauseIcon.style.display = 'block';\n        } else {\n            elements.playIcon.style.display = 'block';\n            elements.pauseIcon.style.display = 'none';\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Mode Transitions\n    // ============================================\n    function enterReplayMode(fromMs, toMs) {\n        console.log('[Replay] Entering replay mode:', { fromMs, toMs });\n\n        state.isReplayMode = true;\n\n        // Start replay session\n        startReplaySession(fromMs, toMs).then(sessionId => {\n            // Show replay control bar\n            if (elements.bar) {\n                elements.bar.style.display = 'block';\n            }\n\n            // Notify 3D visualization to enter replay mode\n            if (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.enterReplayMode) {\n                Viz3D.enterReplayMode();\n            }\n\n            return sessionId;\n        }).catch(err => {\n            console.error('[Replay] Failed to enter replay mode:', err);\n            if (window.SpaxelApp) {\n                SpaxelApp.showToast('Failed to enter replay mode: ' + err.message, 'error');\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    function exitReplayMode() {\n        console.log('[Replay] Exiting replay mode');\n\n        // Stop replay session\n        return stopReplaySession().then(() => {\n            state.isReplayMode = false;\n            state.isPaused = false;\n\n            // Hide replay control bar\n            if (elements.bar) {\n                elements.bar.style.display = 'none';\n            }\n\n            // Notify 3D visualization to exit replay mode\n            if (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.exitReplayMode) {\n                Viz3D.exitReplayMode();\n            }\n\n            // Clear timeline selection and now-replaying chip\n            if (window.SpaxelSidebarTimeline) {\n                SpaxelSidebarTimeline.clearSelection();\n                SpaxelSidebarTimeline.hideNowReplayingChip();\n            }\n\n            // Navigate back to live mode\n            if (window.SpaxelRouter) {\n                SpaxelRouter.navigate('live');\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    function pauseLiveMode() {\n        if (state.isPaused) {\n            // Already paused, exit replay mode\n            exitReplayMode();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        console.log('[Replay] Pausing live mode');\n\n        state.isPaused = true;\n\n        // Calculate replay window (default: 60 seconds before now)\n        const now = Date.now();\n        const fromMs = now - (CONFIG.defaultReplayWindowSec * 1000);\n        const toMs = now;\n\n        enterReplayMode(fromMs, toMs);\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Timeline Loop\n    // ============================================\n    let timelineInterval = null;\n\n    function startTimelineLoop() {\n        if (timelineInterval) return;\n\n        timelineInterval = setInterval(() => {\n            if (state.sessionState === 'playing' && state.activeSessionId) {\n                // Fetch current session state\n                fetch(`/api/replay/session/${state.activeSessionId}`)\n                    .then(res => res.json())\n                    .then(data => {\n                        state.sessionCurrentMs = data.current_ms;\n                        updateUI();\n\n                        // Trigger 3D visualization update with replay blobs\n                        if (data.blobs && window.Viz3D && Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs) {\n                            Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs(data.blobs, data.timestamp_ms);\n                        }\n                    })\n                    .catch(err => {\n                        console.error('[Replay] Failed to fetch session state:', err);\n                    });\n            }\n        }, CONFIG.timelineUpdateInterval);\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Tuning Panel\n    // ============================================\n    function showTuningPanel() {\n        // Create or show tuning panel overlay\n        let panel = document.getElementById('replay-tuning-panel');\n        if (!panel) {\n            panel = createTuningPanel();\n            document.body.appendChild(panel);\n        }\n\n        panel.style.display = 'flex';\n\n        // Fetch current session params\n        if (state.activeSessionId) {\n            fetch(`/api/replay/session/${state.activeSessionId}`)\n                .then(res => res.json())\n                .then(data => {\n                    populateTuningPanel(data.params || <h2>Detection Parameters</h2>\n                    <button class=\"replay-tuning-close\" onclick=\"this.parentElement.parentElement.parentElement.style.display='none'\">\n                        <svg           <div class=\"tuning-param\">\n                        <label>Baseline Time Constant (tau) [seconds]</label>\n                        <input type=\"range\" id=\"tune-tau\" min=\"1\"   <input type=\"range\" id=\"tune-subcarriers\" min=\"8\" max=\"47\" step=\"1\" value=\"16\">\n                        <span class=\"tuning-value\">16</span>\n                    </div>\n\n                    <div class=\"tuning-param\">\n                        <label>Breathing Sensitivity</label>\n                        <input type=\"range\" id=\"tune-breathing\" min=\"0.001\" max=\"0.1\" panel.querySelector('#tune-apply-btn').addEventListener('click', applyTuningParams);\n        panel.querySelector('#tune-reset-btn').addEventListener('click', resetTuningParams);\n\n        // Update parseFloat(panel.querySelector('#tune-threshold').value),\n            tau_s: parseFloat(panel.querySelector('#tune-tau').value),\n            fresnel_decay: parseFloat(panel.querySelector('#tune-fresnel').value),\n            n_subcarriers: parseInt(panel.querySelector('#tune-subcarriers').value, 10),\n            breathing_sensitivity: const seconds = String(date.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');\n        return `${hours}:${minutes}:${seconds}`;\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Jump-to-Time (tap-to-jump from timeline)\n    // ============================================\n    function jumpToTime(timestampMs, windowMs) {\n        if (!windowMs) windowMs = 5000; // ±5 seconds default\n\n        console.log('[Replay] Jump to time:', timestampMs, 'window:', windowMs);\n\n        state.isReplayMode = true;\n\n        return fetch('/api/replay/jump-to-time', {\n            method: 'POST',\n            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n            body: JSON.stringify({\n                timestamp_ms: timestampMs,\n                window_ms: windowMs\n            })\n        })\n        .then(res => {\n            if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to jump to time: ' + res.statusText);\n            return res.json();\n        })\n        .then(data => {\n            state.activeSessionId = data.session_id;\n            state.sessionFromMs = data.from_ms;\n            state.sessionToMs = data.to_ms;\n            state.sessionCurrentMs = data.timestamp_ms;\n            state.sessionState = data.state || 'paused';\n            state.sessionSpeed = 1;\n\n            // Show replay control bar\n            if (elements.bar) {\n                elements.bar.style.display = 'block';\n            }\n\n            updateUI();\n\n            // Notify 3D visualization to enter replay mode\n            if (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.enterReplayMode)   });\n        });\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Cross-Module Callback (from timeline click)\n    // ============================================\n    function onJumpToTime(sessionId, timestampMs) {\n        console.log('[Replay] onJumpToTime callback:', sessionId, timestampMs);\n\n        state.activeSessionId = sessionId;\n        state.sessionCurrentMs = timestampMs;\n        state.sessionState = 'paused';\n        state.sessionSpeed = 1;\n        state.isReplayMode = true;\n\n        // Fetch full session details from the API\n        fetch('/api/replay/session/' + encodeURIComponent(sessionId))\n            .then(function(res) {\n                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch session');\n                return res.json();\n            })\n            .then(function(data) {\n                state.sessionFromMs = data.from_ms;\n                state.sessionToMs = data.to_ms;\n                state.sessionCurrentMs = data.current_ms || timestampMs;\n                state.sessionState = data.state || 'paused';\n                state.sessionSpeed = data.speed || 1;\n\n                // Show replay control bar\n                if (elements.bar) {\n                    elements.bar.style.display = 'block';\n                }\n\n                updateUI();\n\n                // Notify 3D visualization to enter replay mode\n                if (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.enterReplayMode) {\n                    Viz3D.enterReplayMode();\n                }\n\n                // Feed replay blobs to 3D scene if available\n                if (data.blobs && data.blobs.length > 0 && window.Viz3D && Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs) {\n                    Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs(data.blobs, data.timestamp_ms);\n                }\n            })\n            .catch(function(err) {\n                console.error('[Replay] onJumpToTime session fetch failed:', err);\n                // Still show the bar with partial state\n                if (elements.bar) {\n                    elements.bar.style.display = 'block';\n                }\n                updateUI();\n            });\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Public API\n    // ============================================\n    window.SpaxelReplay = {\n        init: init,\n\n        // Pause session info\n        getSession: () => ({\n            id: state.activeSessionId,\n            fromMs: state.sessionFromMs,\n            toMs: state.sessionToMs,\n            currentMs:        }, observerOptions);\n314\t\n315\t        console.log('[SidebarTimeline] Virtualization enabled');\n316\t    }\n317\t\n318\t    function handleIntersection(entries) {\n319\t visible range based on scroll position\n340\t        const firstIndex = Math.floor(state.virtualization.scrollTop / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n341\t        const visibleCount = Math.ceil(elements.content.clientHeight / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n342\t        const lastIndex = firstIndex + visibleCount;\n343\t\n344\t        state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = Math.max(0, firstIndex - CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize);\n345\t        state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = Math.min(state.events.length - 1, lastIndex + CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize);\n346\t\n347\t        updateRenderedRange();\n348\t    }\n349\t\n350\t    function updateRenderedRange() {\n351\t        if (!state.events.length) return;\n352\t\n353\t        const firstIdx = Math.max(0, state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex);\n354\t        const lastIdx = Math.min(state.events.length - 1, state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex);\n355\t\n356\t        // Create new set of rendered indices\n357\t        const newRenderedIndices = new Set();\n358\t        for (let i = firstIdx; i <= lastIdx; i++) {\n359\t            newRenderedIndices.add(i);\n360\t        }\n361\t\n362\t        // Render new items\n363\t        const fragment = document.createDocumentFragment();\n364\t        newRenderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n365\t            if (!state.virtualization.renderedIndices.has(index)) {\n366\t                const event = state.events[index];\n367\t                if (event) {\n368\t                    const tempDiv = document.createElement('div');\n369\t                    tempDiv.innerHTML = renderEvent(event, false, index);\n370\t                    const newEventEl = tempDiv.firstElementChild;\n371\t                    if (newEventEl) {\n372\t                        newEventEl.dataset.index = index;\n373\t                        fragment.appendChild(newEventEl);\n374\t                    }\n375\t                }\n376\t            }\n377\t        });\n378\t\n379\t        if (fragment.children.length > 0) {\n380\t            elements.eventsContainer.appendChild(fragment);\n381\t\n382\t            // Bind rendered range\n392\t        state.virtualization.renderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n393\t            if (!newRenderedIndices.has(index)) {\n394\t                const item = elements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-index=\"' + index + '\"]');\n395\t                if (item) {\n396\t                    if (state.virtualization.observer) {\n397\t                        state.virtualization.observer.unobserve(item);\n398\t                    }\n399\t                    item.remove();\n400\t                }\n401\t            }\n402\t        });\n403\t\n404\t        state.virtualization.renderedIndices = newRenderedIndices;\n405\t\n406\t        // Update spacers\n407\t        updateSpacers();\n408\t    }\n409\t\n410\t    function updateSpacers() {\n411\t        if (!elements.spacerTop || !elements.spacerBottom) return;\n412\t\n413\t        const topHeight = state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex * CONFIG.itemHeight;\n414\t        const bottomHeight = (state.events.length - state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex - 1) * CONFIG.itemHeight;\n415\t\n416\t        elements.spacerTop.style.height = Math.max(0, topHeight) + 'px';\n417\t        elements.spacerBottom.style.height = Math.max(0, bottomHeight) + 'px';\n418\t    }\n419\t\n420\t    // ============================================\n421\t    // Rendering\n422\t    // ============================================\n423\t    function renderEvents() {\n424\t        if (!elements.eventsContainer) return;\n425\t\n426\t        if (state.events.length === 0) {\n427\t            elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = '';\n428\t            if (elements.empty) {\n429\t                elements.empty.style.display = 'flex';\n430\t            }\n431\t            if (elements.loading) {\n432\t                elements.loading.style.display = 'none';\n433\t            }\n434\t            return;\n435\t        }\n436\t\n437\t        elements.empty.style.display = 'none';\n438\t        elements.loading.style.display = 'none';\n439\t\n440\t        // Use virtualized rendering for large datasets\n441\t        if (CONFIG.virtualization.enabled && renderAll() {\n449\t        let html = '';\n450\t        state.events.forEach(function(event, index) {\n451\t            html += renderEvent(event, false, index);\n452\t        });\n453\t        elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = html;\n454\t\n455\t        // Bind handlers\n456\t        Array.from(elements.eventsContainer.children).forEach(function(item) {\n457\t '';\n464\t\n465\t        // Calculate initial visible range\n466\t        const containerHeight = elements.content.clientHeight || 400;\n467\t        const visibleCount = Math.ceil(containerHeight / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n468\t        const bufferCount = CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize;\n469\t\n470\t        state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = 0;\n471\t        state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = Math.min(state.events.length - 1, visibleCount + bufferCount * 2);\n472\t\n473\t        // Create spacers\n474\t        updateSpacers();\n475\t\n476\t        // ' severity-critical' :\n487\t                            event.severity === 'warning' ? ' severity-warning' : '';\n488\t        const newClass = isNew ? ' new-event' : '';\n489\t\n490\t        // System events get secondary styling\n491\t        const systemEventTypes = ['node_online', 'node_offline', 'ota_update', 'baseline_changed', 'system', 'learning_milestone', 'anomaly_learned'];\n492\t        const isSystemEvent = systemEventTypes.indexOf(event.type) !== -1;\n493\t        const secondaryClass = isSystemEvent ? ' secondary' : '';\n494\t\n495\t        const dataIndex = index !== undefined ? ` data-index=\"${index}\"` : '';\n496\t\n497\t        return `\n498\t            <div data-timestamp=\"${event.timestamp_ms}\"${dataIndex}>\n502\t                <div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-icon\">${typeInfo.icon}</div>\n503\t                <div              aria-label=\"Thumbs down\">👎</button>\n518\t                </div>\n519\t            </div>\n520\t        `;\n521\t    }\n522\t\n523\t    function buildEventDescription(event, typeInfo) {\n524\t        // Parse detail_json for additional context\n525\t        let detail = {};\n526\t        if (event.detail_json) {\n527\t            try {\n528\t                detail = JSON.parse(event.detail_json);\n529\t            } catch (e) {\n530\t                // Ignore parse errors\n531\t            }\n532\t        }\n533\t\n534\t        // Build description using    return description;\n556\t    }\n557\t\n558\t    function formatTimestamp(ms) {\n559\t        const date = new Date(ms);\n560\t        const now = new Date();\n561\t        const isToday = date.toDateString() === now.toDateString();\n562\t\n563\t        const time = date.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });\n564\t\n565\t        if (isToday) {\n566\t            return time;\n567\t        } else {\n568\t            return date.toLocaleDateString() + ' ' + time;\n569\t        }\n570\t    }\n571\t\n572\t    function escapeHtml(str) {\n573\t        if (!str) .replace(/\"/g, '&quot;');\n579\t    }\n580\t\n581\t    // ============================================\n582\t    // Event Handlers\n583\t    // ============================================\n584\t    function bindEventHandlers(eventEl) {\n585\t        // Feedback buttons\n586\t        eventEl.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-timeline-action-btn').forEach(function(btn) {\n587\t       if (window.Feedback) {\n607\t            const event = state.events.find(function(e) { return e.id == eventId; });\n608\t            if (event) {\n609\t                let detail = {};\n610\t                try {\n611\t                    detail = event.detail_json ? 'correct' : 'incorrect',\n643\t                event_id: parseInt(eventId, 10)\n644\t            };\n645\t\n646\t            fetch('/api/feedback', {\n647\t                method: 'POST',\n648\t                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n649\t                body: JSON.stringify(payload)\n650\t            })\n651\t                .then(function(res) {\n652\t                    if (res.ok) {\n653\t                        return res.json();\n654\t                    }\n655\t                    throw new Error('Failed to submit feedback');\n656\t                })\n657\t                .then(function(data) {\n658\t                    // Show visual feedback\n659\t                    const feedbackBtns = eventElement.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-timeline-action-btn');\n660\t                    feedbackBtns.forEach(function(btn) {\n661\t                        if (btn.dataset.action === action) {\n662\t                            btn.classList.add('active');\n663\t                            setTimeout(function() {\n664\t                                btn.classList.remove('active');\n665\t                            }, 2000);\n666\t                        }\n667\t                    });\n668\t\n669\t                    // Show toast notification\n670\t                    if (window.SpaxelApp && SpaxelApp.showToast) {\n671\t                        const message = correct ? (window.SpaxelApp) {\n            SpaxelApp.registerMessageHandler(handleWebSocketMessage);\n        }\n\n        console.log('[SidebarTimeline] Initialized');\n    }\n\n    function cacheElements() {\n        elements.panel = document.getElementById('sidebar-timeline-panel');\n        elements.content = document.getElementById('sidebar-timeline-content');\n        elements.eventsContainer = document.getElementById('sidebar-timeline-events');\n        elements.loading = document.getElementById('sidebar-timeline-loading');\n        elements.empty = document.getElementById('sidebar-timeline-empty');\n        elements.spacerTop = document.getElementById('sidebar-timeline-spacer-top');\n        elements.spacerBottom = document.getElementById('sidebar-timeline-spacer-bottom');\n        elements.toggleBtn = document.getElementById('sidebar-timeline-toggle');\n        elements.closeBtn = document.getElementById('sidebar-timeline-close');\n        elements.showBtn = document.getElementById('sidebar-timeline-show-btn');\n    }\n\n    function bindEvents() {\n        // Panel toggle buttons\n        if (elements.toggleBtn) {\n            elements.toggleBtn.addEventListener('click', togglePanel);\n        }\n        if (elements.closeBtn) {\n            elements.closeBtn.addEventListener('click', hidePanel);\n        }\n        if (elements.showBtn) {\n            elements.showBtn.addEventListener('click', showPanel);\n        }\n\n        // Scroll events for virtualization\n        if (elements.content) {\n            elements.content.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Mode Change Handlers\n    // ============================================\n\n    function onRouterModeChange(newMode, oldMode) {\n        // Reload events if panel is visible\n        if (state.panelVisible) {\n            loadInitialEvents();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Panel Visibility\n    // ============================================\n    function showPanel() {\n        if (elements.panel) {\n            elements.panel.classList.remove('collapsed');\n            state.panelVisible = true;\n        }\n        if (elements.showBtn) {\n            elements.showBtn.classList.add('hidden');\n        }\n    }\n\n    function hidePanel() {\n        if (elements.panel) {\n            elements.panel.classList.add('collapsed');\n            state.panelVisible = false;\n        }\n        if (elements.showBtn) {\n            elements.showBtn.classList.remove('hidden');\n        }\n    }\n\n    function togglePanel() {\n        if (state.panelVisible) {\n            hidePanel();\n        } else {\n            showPanel();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Event Loading\n    // ============================================\n    function loadInitialEvents() {\n        const params = new URLSearchParams();\n        params.set('limit', CONFIG.initialLoadLimit);\n\n        fetch('/api/events?' + params.toString())\n            .then(function(res) {\n                if (!res.ok) {\n                    throw new Error('Failed to fetch events: ' + res.statusText);\n                }\n                return res.json();\n            })\n            .then(function(data) {\n                state.events = data.events || [];\n                state.cursor = data.cursor || null;\n                state.total = data.total_filtered || 0;\n                renderEvents();\n            })\n            .catch(function(err) {\n                console.error('[SidebarTimeline] Failed to load events:', err);\n                showError(err.message);\n            })\n            .finally(function() {\n                state.loading = false;\n                updateLoadingState();\n            });\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Virtualization Setup\n    // ============================================\n    function setupVirtualization() {\n        if (!CONFIG.virtualization.enabled || !elements.content) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // Create IntersectionObserver for lazy rendering\n        const observerOptions = {\n            root: elements.content,\n            rootMargin: CONFIG.virtualization.rootMargin,\n            threshold: CONFIG.virtualization.threshold\n        };\n\n        state.virtualization.observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {\n            handleIntersection(entries);\n        }, observerOptions);\n\n        console.log('[SidebarTimeline] Virtualization enabled');\n    }\n\n    function handleIntersection(entries) {\n        entries.forEach(function(entry) {\n            const index = parseInt(entry.target.dataset.index, 10);\n            if (isNaN(index)) return;\n\n            if (entry.isIntersecting) {\n                state.virtualization.visibleIndices.add(index);\n            } else {\n                state.virtualization.visibleIndices.delete(index);\n            }\n        });\n\n        // Update rendered range based on visibility\n        updateRenderedRange();\n    }\n\n    function onScroll() {\n        if (!elements.content) return;\n\n        state.virtualization.scrollTop = elements.content.scrollTop;\n\n        // Update visible range based on scroll position\n        const firstIndex = Math.floor(state.virtualization.scrollTop / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n        const visibleCount = Math.ceil(elements.content.clientHeight / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n        const lastIndex = firstIndex + visibleCount;\n\n        state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = Math.max(0, firstIndex - CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize);\n        state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = Math.min(state.events.length - 1, lastIndex + CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize);\n\n        updateRenderedRange();\n    }\n\n    function updateRenderedRange() {\n        if (!state.events.length) return;\n\n        const firstIdx = Math.max(0, state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex);\n        const lastIdx = Math.min(state.events.length - 1, state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex);\n\n        // Create new set of rendered indices\n        const newRenderedIndices = new Set();\n        for (let i = firstIdx; i <= lastIdx; i++) {\n            newRenderedIndices.add(i);\n        }\n\n        // Render new items\n        const fragment = document.createDocumentFragment();\n        newRenderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n            if (!state.virtualization.renderedIndices.has(index)) {\n                const event = state.events[index];\n                if (event) {\n                    const tempDiv = document.createElement('div');\n                    tempDiv.innerHTML = renderEvent(event, false, index);\n                    const newEventEl = tempDiv.firstElementChild;\n                    if (newEventEl) {\n                        newEventEl.dataset.index = index;\n                        fragment.appendChild(newEventEl);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        });\n\n        if (fragment.children.length > 0) {\n            elements.eventsContainer.appendChild(fragment);\n\n            // Bind handlers for new items\n            Array.from(fragment.children).forEach(function(item) {\n                bindEventHandlers(item);\n                if (state.virtualization.observer) {\n                    state.virtualization.observer.observe(item);\n                }\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Remove items that are no longer in rendered range\n        state.virtualization.renderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n            if (!newRenderedIndices.has(index)) {\n                const item = elements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-index=\"' + index + '\"]');\n                if (item) {\n                    if (state.virtualization.observer) {\n                        state.virtualization.observer.unobserve(item);\n                    }\n                    item.remove();\n                }\n            }\n        });\n\n        state.virtualization.renderedIndices = newRenderedIndices;\n\n        // Update spacers\n        updateSpacers();\n    }\n\n    function updateSpacers() {\n        if (!elements.spacerTop || !elements.spacerBottom) return;\n\n        const topHeight = state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex * CONFIG.itemHeight;\n        const bottomHeight = (state.events.length - state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex - 1) * CONFIG.itemHeight;\n\n        elements.spacerTop.style.height = Math.max(0, topHeight) + 'px';\n        elements.spacerBottom.style.height = Math.max(0, bottomHeight) + 'px';\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Rendering\n    // ============================================\n    function renderEvents() {\n        if (!elements.eventsContainer) return;\n\n        if (state.events.length === 0) {\n            elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = '';\n            if (elements.empty) {\n                elements.empty.style.display = 'flex';\n            }\n            if (elements.loading) {\n                elements.loading.style.display = 'none';\n            }\n            return;\n        }\n\n        elements.empty.style.display = 'none';\n        elements.loading.style.display = 'none';\n\n        // Use virtualized rendering for large datasets\n        if (CONFIG.virtualization.enabled && state.events.length > CONFIG.maxDOMItems) {\n            renderVirtualized();\n        } else {\n            renderAll();\n        }\n    }\n\n    function renderAll() {\n        let html = '';\n        state.events.forEach(function(event, index) {\n            html += renderEvent(event, false, index);\n        });\n        elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = html;\n\n        // Bind handlers\n        Array.from(elements.eventsContainer.children).forEach(function(item) {\n            bindEventHandlers(item);\n        });\n    }\n\n    function renderVirtualized() {\n        // Clear existing content\n        elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = '';\n\n        // Calculate initial visible range\n        const containerHeight = elements.content.clientHeight || 400;\n        const visibleCount = Math.ceil(containerHeight / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n        const bufferCount = CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize;\n\n        state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = 0;\n        state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = Math.min(state.events.length - 1, visibleCount + bufferCount * 2);\n\n        // Create spacers\n        updateSpacers();\n\n        // Render initial batch\n        updateRenderedRange();\n    }\n\n    function renderEvent(event, isNew, index) {\n        const typeInfo = EVENT_TYPES[event.type] || EVENT_TYPES.system;\n        const timeStr = formatTimestamp(event.timestamp_ms);\n        const description = buildEventDescription(event, typeInfo);\n\n        // Severity indicator\n        const severityClass = event.severity === 'alert' || event.severity === 'critical' ? ' severity-critical' :\n                            event.severity === 'warning' ? ' severity-warning' : '';\n        const newClass = isNew ? ' new-event' : '';\n\n        // System events get secondary styling\n        const systemEventTypes = ['node_online', 'node_offline', 'ota_update', 'baseline_changed', 'system', 'learning_milestone', 'anomaly_learned'];\n        const isSystemEvent = systemEventTypes.indexOf(event.type) !== -1;\n        const secondaryClass = isSystemEvent ? ' secondary' : '';\n\n        const dataIndex = index !== undefined ? ` data-index=\"${index}\"` : '';\n\n        return `\n            <div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event${severityClass}${newClass}${secondaryClass}\"\n                 data-type=\"${event.type}\"\n                 data-id=\"${event.id}\"\n                 data-timestamp=\"${event.timestamp_ms}\"${dataIndex}>\n                <div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-icon\">${typeInfo.icon}</div>\n                <div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-content\">\n                    <div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-title\">${escapeHtml(description)}</div>\n                    <div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-meta\">\n                        <span class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-time\">${timeStr}</span>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-actions\">\n                    <button class=\"sidebar-timeline-action-btn feedback-positive\"\n                            data-action=\"correct\"\n                            title=\"Correct detection\"\n                            aria-label=\"Thumbs up\">👍</button>\n                    <button class=\"sidebar-timeline-action-btn feedback-negative\"\n                            data-action=\"incorrect\"\n                            title=\"Incorrect detection\"\n                            aria-label=\"Thumbs down\">👎</button>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        `;\n    }\n\n    function buildEventDescription(event, typeInfo) {\n        // Parse detail_json for additional context\n        let detail = {};\n        if (event.detail_json) {\n            try {\n                detail = JSON.parse(event.detail_json);\n            } catch (e) {\n                // Ignore parse errors\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Build description using template\n        let description = typeInfo.description;\n\n        // Replace placeholders with actual values\n        const replacements = {\n            '{person}': event.person || detail.person || 'Someone',\n            '{zone}': event.zone || detail.zone || 'the area',\n            '{from_zone}': detail.from_zone || 'previous zone',\n            '{to_zone}': detail.to_zone || 'next zone',\n            '{node}': detail.node || 'a node',\n            '{version}': detail.version || 'latest',\n            '{link}': detail.link || 'a link',\n            '{description}': detail.description || 'activity detected',\n            '{duration}': detail.duration || 'a while'\n        };\n\n        // Apply replacements\n        for (const [placeholder, value] of Object.entries(replacements)) {\n            description = description.replace(placeholder, value);\n        }\n\n        return description;\n    }\n\n    function formatTimestamp(ms) {\n        const date = new Date(ms);\n        const now = new Date();\n        const isToday = date.toDateString() === now.toDateString();\n\n        const time = date.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });\n\n        if (isToday) {\n            return time;\n        } else {\n            return date.toLocaleDateString() + ' ' + time;\n        }\n    }\n\n    function escapeHtml(str) {\n        if (!str) return '';\n        return String(str)\n            .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')\n            .replace(/</g, '&lt;')\n            .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')\n            .replace(/\"/g, '&quot;');\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Event Handlers\n    // ============================================\n    function bindEventHandlers(eventEl) {\n        // Feedback buttons\n        eventEl.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-timeline-action-btn').forEach(function(btn) {\n            btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n                const action = btn.dataset.action;\n                const eventId = eventEl.dataset.id;\n                handleFeedback(eventId, action, eventEl);\n            });\n        });\n\n        // Event click (seeks to timestamp in replay)\n        eventEl.addEventListener('click', function() {\n            const timestamp = parseInt(this.dataset.timestamp, 10);\n            handleSeek(timestamp, this);\n        });\n    }\n\n    function handleFeedback(eventId, action, eventElement) {\n        const correct = action === 'correct';\n\n        // Delegate to feedback module if available\n        if (window.Feedback) {\n            const event = state.events.find(function(e) { return e.id == eventId; });\n            if (event) {\n                let detail = {};\n                try {\n                    detail = event.detail_json ? JSON.parse(event.detail_json) : {};\n                } catch (e) {}\n\n                // Call feedback module's sendFeedback\n                Feedback.sendFeedback(eventId, event.type, correct ? 'TRUE_POSITIVE' : 'FALSE_POSITIVE', detail);\n\n                // Show visual feedback immediately\n                const feedbackBtns = eventElement.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-timeline-action-btn');\n                feedbackBtns.forEach(function(btn) {\n                    if (btn.dataset.action === action) {\n                        btn.classList.add('active');\n                        setTimeout(function() {\n                            btn.classList.remove('active');\n                        }, 2000);\n                    }\n                });\n\n                // Show toast notification\n                if (window.SpaxelApp && SpaxelApp.showToast) {\n                    const message = correct ? 'Thanks for the feedback!' : 'Thanks — I\\'ll adjust my detection.';\n                    SpaxelApp.showToast(message, 'success');\n                }\n\n                // Dismiss entry for incorrect feedback\n                if (!correct) {\n                    eventElement.classList.add('feedback-dismissed');\n                }\n            }\n        } else {\n            // Fallback: direct API call\n            const payload = {\n                type: correct ? 'correct' : 'incorrect',\n                event_id: parseInt(eventId, 10)\n            };\n\n            fetch('/api/feedback', {\n                method: 'POST',\n                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n                body: JSON.stringify(payload)\n            })\n                .then(function(res) {\n                    if (res.ok) {\n                        return res.json();\n                    }\n                    throw new Error('Failed to submit feedback');\n                })\n                .then(function(data) {\n                    // Show visual feedback\n                    const feedbackBtns = eventElement.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-timeline-action-btn');\n                    feedbackBtns.forEach(function(btn) {\n                        if (btn.dataset.action === action) {\n                            btn.classList.add('active');\n                            setTimeout(function() {\n                                btn.classList.remove('active');\n                            }, 2000);\n                        }\n                    });\n\n                    // Show toast notification\n                    if (window.SpaxelApp && SpaxelApp.showToast) {\n                        const message = correct ? 'Thanks for the feedback!' : 'Thanks — I\\'ll adjust my detection.';\n                        SpaxelApp.showToast(message, 'success');\n                    }\n\n                    // Dismiss entry for incorrect feedback\n                    if (!correct) {\n                        eventElement.classList.add('feedback-dismissed');\n                    }\n                })\n                .catch(function(err) {\n                    console.error('[SidebarTimeline] Feedback failed:', err);\n                });\n        }\n    }\n\n    function handleSeek(timestamp, eventEl) {\n        if (!timestamp || timestamp <= 0) return;\n\n        // Highlight selected event\n        clearSelectedEvent();\n        if (eventEl) {\n            state.selectedEventId = eventEl.dataset.id;\n            eventEl.classList.add('selected');\n        }\n\n        // Jump-to-time replay\n        if (window.SpaxelReplay) {\n            SpaxelReplay.jumpToTime(timestamp).then(function() {\n                updateNowReplayingChip(true, timestamp);\n\n                // Clear full-page timeline selection to avoid stale highlight\n                if (window.SpaxelTimeline && SpaxelTimeline.clearSelection) {\n                    SpaxelTimeline.clearSelection();\n                }\n            }).catch(function(err) {\n                console.error('[SidebarTimeline] Jump-to-time failed:', err);\n                if (window.SpaxelApp && SpaxelApp.showToast) {\n                    SpaxelApp.showToast('Failed to jump to time', 'error');\n                }\n            });\n        } else if (window.SpaxelRouter) {\n            SpaxelRouter.navigate('timeline');\n        }\n    }\n\n    function clearSelectedEvent() {\n        if (state.selectedEventId) {\n            const prev = elements.eventsContainer\n                ? elements.eventsContainer.querySelector('.sidebar-timeline-event.selected')\n                : null;\n            if (prev) {\n                prev.classList.remove('selected');\n            }\n            state.selectedEventId = null;\n        }\n    }\n\n    function updateNowReplayingChip(visible, timestampMs) {\n        let chip = document.getElementById('now-replaying-chip');\n        if (!chip) {\n            // Create chip in the sidebar panel header\n            const header = document.querySelector('.sidebar-panel-header');\n            if (!header) return;\n            chip = document.createElement('span');\n            chip.id = 'now-replaying-chip';\n            chip.className = 'now-replaying-chip';\n            header.appendChild(chip);\n        }\n\n        if (visible && timestampMs) {\n            const date = new Date(timestampMs);\n            const time = date.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit' });\n            chip.textContent = 'Now replaying ' + time;\n            chip.style.display = 'inline-flex';\n        } else {\n            chip.style.display = 'none';\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // WebSocket Message Handler\n    // ============================================\n    function handleWebSocketMessage(msg) {\n        if (msg.type === 'event') {\n            handleNewEvent(msg.event);\n        }\n    }\n\n    function handleNewEvent(event) {\n        // Normalize event format\n        const normalizedEvent = {\n            id: event.id || event.timestamp_ms || Date.now(),\n            timestamp_ms: event.timestamp_ms || event.ts || Date.now(),\n            type: event.type || event.kind || 'system',\n            zone: event.zone || '',\n            person: event.person || event.person_name || '',\n            blob_id: event.blob_id || event.blobID || 0,\n            detail_json: event.detail_json || '',\n            severity: event.severity || 'info'\n        };\n\n        // Add to beginning of events\n        state.events.unshift(normalizedEvent);\n        state.total++;\n\n        // Limit events in memory\n        if (state.events.length > CONFIG.maxEventsInMemory) {\n            state.events = state.events.slice(0, CONFIG.maxEventsInMemory);\n        }\n\n        // Re-render if panel is visible\n        if (state.panelVisible) {\n            renderEvents();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // UI Updates\n    // ============================================\n    function updateLoadingState() {\n        if (!elements.loading) return;\n        elements.loading.style.display = state.loading ? 'flex' : 'none';\n    }\n\n    function showError(message) {\n        console.error('[SidebarTimeline]', message);\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Public API\n    // ============================================\n    const SidebarTimeline = {\n        init: init,\n        show: showPanel,\n        hide: hidePanel,\n        toggle: togglePanel,\n        refresh: loadInitialEvents,\n        isVisible: function() { return state.panelVisible; },\n        clearSelection: clearSelectedEvent,\n        hideNowReplayingChip: function() { updateNowReplayingChip(false); }\n    };\n\n    // Auto-initialize when DOM is ready\n    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);\n    } else {\n        init();\n    }\n\n    // Export for use by other modules\n    window.SpaxelSidebarTimeline = SidebarTimeline;\n\n    console.log('[SidebarTimeline] Module loaded');\n})();\n","numLines":825,"startLine":1,"totalLines":825}}}
